SEARCH
Package com.orasaka.core.infrastructure.video

Class OrasakaVideoService

java.lang.Object
com.orasaka.core.infrastructure.video.OrasakaVideoService
@Service public class OrasakaVideoService extends Object
Service for AI-powered video generation via the LocalAI bare-metal REST API.

Uses a RestClient to call the /v1/videos/generations endpoint, sending a text prompt and duration parameter, and decoding the base64-encoded MP4 response.

Video generation is gated by the orasaka.core.video.generation.enabled configuration flag; calls made when disabled throw NonTransientAiException.

Since:
1.0.0
See Also:

  • OrasakaVideoResponse

  • Constructor Details

    • OrasakaVideoService

      public OrasakaVideoService(org.springframework.web.client.RestClient.Builder builder, CoreProperties properties)
      Constructs the video service with a RestClient builder and core properties.
      Parameters:
      builder - Spring RestClient builder for HTTP client construction.
      properties - Core configuration for provider URLs and feature flags.
      Throws:
      OrasakaException - If the localai-video base URL is missing.

  • Method Details

    • generateVideo

      public OrasakaVideoResponse generateVideo(OrasakaVideoRequest request)
      Generates a video from a text prompt using the LocalAI inference endpoint.
      Parameters:
      request - The video generation request with prompt and duration.
      Returns:
      The generated video response containing raw MP4 bytes.
      Throws:
      org.springframework.ai.retry.NonTransientAiException - If video generation is disabled or the inference call fails.
